user.title: Digital Strom Connection
user.description: Choose how to connect to your Digital Strom Server (dSS).

local.title: Local Connection
local.description: Enter the IP address of your dSS.

approve_token.title: Approve Application
approve_token.description:
Approve the WoonIoT connection in your Digital Strom Configurator:

1. Open the dSS admin interface in your browser
2. Go to System > Access Authorization
3. Find 'WoonIoT HA Connect' and check the box to approve

Token: {token}

Click Submit after approving.

cloud.title: Cloud Connection
cloud.description: Enter your Digital Strom cloud URL and credentials.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to dSS. Check IP/URL and ensure the server is reachable.
error.token_not_approved: Token not yet approved. Approve the connection in dSS admin under Access Authorization.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to dSS after authentication.
abort.already_configured: This Digital Strom server is already configured.

init.title: Digital Strom Zones
init.description: Select which zones to include in Home Assistant.

data_description.invert_cover_position: Enable this if your blinds/screens move in the wrong direction (open/close reversed)
